Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to write a DuckDB SQL query The event_log table has case_id activity timestamp Goal Identify cases where there is a direct succession sequence Approve Purchase Requisition followed immediately by Create Order followed immediately by Confirm Order with no other activities in between Then among those cases where the time between Create Order and Confirm Order greater than 5 days Then exclude those cases entirely Return all events from other cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce a query that returns all events from event_log where case_id is not in that filtered set

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Approach Find case_id that has the sequence with direct succession and time greater than 5 days between the two last events Then select all events where case_id not in those case_ids

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to define direct succession For a given case events are ordered by timestamp The sequence must appear consecutively in the order of timestamps So we can use window functions lead lag

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For each event of a case we can check if its activity equals Approve Purchase Requisition and the next activity by timestamp equals Create Order and the next next activity equals Confirm Order That ensures direct succession

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then we need to calculate time difference between Create Order and Confirm Order of that sequence If multiple such sequences in same case we only need to check if any such sequence exists with time diff greater than 5 days If exists case is excluded

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Implementation For each case order events by timestamp Then for each event use lead to get next and nextnext activities and timestamps Then when the current activity equals Approve Purchase Requisition and lead1 activity equals Create Order and lead2 activity equals Confirm Order then we have a sequence Then compute datediff between lead1 timestamp and lead2 timestamp If that greater than 5 days then capture case_id

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Finally Select all from event_log where case_id not in select case_id from excluded_cases order by case_id timestamp

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Better next_next_timestamp minus next_timestamp greater than interval 5 days That compares the interval and matches more than 5 days

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Using lead ensures that the next event is immediate next in order
